title: Signal — the evidence artifact produced by validation
description: The only currency accepted at scope boundaries. Written by the validation path, NEVER by the worker (the generator/critic split, made structural). Path: signals/{cell-id}/{ISO-ts}--{harness}.json. See references/agentic-systems-foundations/evals-and-verification.md.

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the signal was produced.

harness.description: The verifier/adapter that produced this signal (e.g. link-check, pytest, llm-judge). Snake- or kebab-cased.

result.description: The verdict. A cell advances to `validated` only on pass.

evidence.description: Localized, actionable detail — where and why, not just pass/fail (a stack trace, a line number, a diff, a scored breakdown).

validated_against.description: Map of upstream cell-id -> content hash this validation was computed against (copied onto the cell on pass; drives staleness propagation).

cost.description: Measured probe cost for this loop (feeds the compass's value function — probe cost is read from the ledger, not estimated).
